_readme: Site-wide settings. Edit this file to change names, links, contacts and the registration embed. No code changes needed.
name: Bush Week Tech Fest
tagline: ...no better place to be in Bush Week!
description: A student-led tech festival celebrating Computer Science and Cybersecurity — a 48-hour BushBash CTF, Tech Talks with industry speakers, free BBQs, a Movie Night, and a Networking & Drinks Night. 31 July – 2 August 2026 at ANU.
shortDescription: ANU CSSA's Bush Week Tech Fest: a 48-hour BushBash CTF, industry Tech Talks, free BBQs and more — 31 Jul–2 Aug 2026.

registration._note: mode: 'embed' shows an iframe of embedUrl; 'link' shows a big button to linkUrl. Swap to Humanitix/Rubric later by changing these two fields.
registration.note: Individual event registrations are live on Humanitix (and Rubric, but this is a shortcut to the Humanitix).

downloads.label: Event Brief (PDF)
downloads.note: Replace the file in public/downloads/ to update — the button never changes.

socials.label: Discord
socials._note: Replace with your direct Discord invite

footerLogos.name: ANU
footerLogos._note: Drop the official ANU logo at public/images/anu-logo.png (renders as a text link until then)

footerLogos.name: ANU School of Computing
footerLogos._note: Drop the SoCo logo at public/images/soco-logo.png

disclaimer: ANU Bush Week Tech Fest is organised by the ANU Computer Science Students' Association (CSSA), a student-run society. The Australian National University provides venue support and a CSS grant but this event is organised by students.
